basic_details.job_title: CSACS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Deputy Director, Store Officer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy Director, Store Officer and More
basic_details.short_information: The Chandigarh State Aids Control Society (CSACS) has officially announced the Various Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was recently published on chandigarhsacs.org.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 60 years and hold qualifications such as Graduate, Post Graduate, or relevant Medical/Public Health degrees can now submit their offline applications before 15 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 60 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Post Graduate in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human development / Nursing, Bachelors Degree in Medical Sciences and MD / DNB, Master / Post Graduation in Public Health / Health Administration
qualification.details: Deputy Director (SI): Bachelors Degree in Medical Sciences and MD / DNB (Community Medicine / Epidemiology) OR Master / Post Graduation in Public Health / Health Administration / Applied Epidemiology or Diploma in Public Health / Masters in Demography / Statistics / Population Sciences / Social Sciences / Computer Application. (Two year course) and similar streams from a Recognized University. Essential Experience: 5 years experience in Public Health in Surveillance / research / M&E / epidemiology. Working knowledge of computers including MS office package and SPSS. Good working knowledge of epidemiological analysis and biostatistics. Desirable: Past experience of working in HIV/AIDS programme or projects under Government or bilateral/multi-lateral agencies in India. Good working knowledge of Epidemiological analysis and other statistical packages. Preference will be given to the candidate working in the field of HIV/ AIDS. Assistant Director (CSS & GIPA): Graduate from reputed institution. Essential Experience: 3 years experience in HIV related matters, preference will be given to PLHAs and other community representatives. Desirable: Sound knowledge of handling virtual meeting platforms, video conferencing, social media platforms and computer skills. Preference will be given to the candidate working in the field of HIV/ AIDS. Store Officer: Graduate. Essential Experience: 3-5 years experience in Store Management, Inventory Control. Well versed with documentation required for logistical operation. Strong computer knowledge. ICTC Counselor: A. Graduate degree holder in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human development / Nursing with 3 years of experience in counseling / educating under National Health programme OR Post-graduate in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human development / Nursing. OR If candidate is a person living with HIV/AIDS (PLHIV), Graduate degree holder in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human development / Nursing with 1 years of experience in counseling / educating under National Health Programmes. B. Desirable: Experience of working under the National AIDS and STD Control Programme (NACP) facility or community settings. C. Knowledge and Skill: The candidate should be computer literate with working knowledge of MS office, usage of internet and electronic mail. Familiarity with government health policies and related programmes. Ability to work in teams, and flexible ways of working as per the need of programme.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSACS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: chandigarhsacs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CSACS Various Contractual Posts is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by the Chandigarh State Aids Control Society (CSACS) for various contractual posts. These include Deputy Director, Assistant Director, Store Officer, and ICTC Counselor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for CSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CSACS recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the contractual posts released by CSACS is 60 years. There are no specific minimum age limits mentioned for these positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the contractual posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 21,000/- to Rs. 50,680/-. The exact salary may vary based on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the ICTC Counselor post?
faq.answer: For the ICTC Counselor post, candidates need to be a Graduate in Psychology, Social Work, Sociology, Anthropology, Human development, or Nursing with 3 years of experience, or a Post-graduate in the same fields. Special provisions exist for PLHIV candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CSACS recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the CSACS contractual posts will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in both stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for CSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for CSACS recruitment can be found on the organization's official website, chandigarhsacs.org.in. A direct link to the PDF is also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What experience is required for the Deputy Director (SI) post?
faq.answer: The Deputy Director (SI) post requires 5 years of experience in Public Health in Surveillance, research, M&E, or epidemiology. Knowledge of computer applications and epidemiological analysis is also essential.
